articles.headline: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
articles.description: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

images.name: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
images.caption: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

articles.headline: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
articles.description: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

images.name: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
images.caption: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

articles.headline: How USMNT, USWNT choose opponents, venues and prices for games
articles.description: USMNT and USWNT fans often complain about high ticket prices, repetitive cities and weak opponents for games, but U.S. Soccer explains everything that goes into such decisions.

images.name: USWNT walks the field at SoFi Stadium April5-2025 [1296x729]
images.credit: Brad Smith/ISI Photos/Getty Images for USSF

images.name: Who should be the starting striker for the USMNT?
images.caption: Herc Gomez and Shaka Hislop discuss the USMNT attacking options as Agyemang, Balogun and Wright all battle to start.

keyEvents.text: César García (Dominican Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal! Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 1. César García (Dominican Republic) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ronaldo Vásquez with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 2. Dorny Romero (Dominican Republic) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.

Goal! Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 3. Ronaldo Vásquez (Dominican Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Luiyi de Lucas with a through ball.
First Half ends, Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 3.
Second Half begins Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 3.
Kieron Richards (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card.
Javorn Stevens (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Michael Sambataro replaces João Urbáez.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Miguel Beltre replaces César García.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Tyrik Hughes replaces Kendukar Challenger.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Daryl Massicot replaces Antonio Morgan.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Raheem Deterville replaces Eugene Kirwan.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Lucas Bretón replaces Heinz Mörschel.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Juan Pineda replaces Edarlyn Reyes.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. D'Andre Bishop replaces Tyrique Tonge.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Shafeeq Joseph replaces Javorn Stevens.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Edison Azcona replaces Ronaldo Vásquez.
Goal! Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 4. Junior Firpo (Dominican Republic) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Sambataro.
Goal! Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 5. Junior Firpo (Dominican Republic) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Second Half ends, Antigua and Barbuda 0, Dominican Republic 5.
